backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that combines blob storage and authorization mixins to provide user profile management, event/announcement CRUD, and contact form submission with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the HomePage was updated to prominently highlight Jackman's hunting and fishing reputation with a callout banner linking to the Recreation page.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry point that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Jackman Maine Town Website that mounts the React app into a root div and loads the main TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with a shared Layout (Navigation + Footer) and defines routes for all six pages of the site.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component displaying the Jackman brand, quick navigation links, contact details, copyright year, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop nav links with active-state highlighting, Internet Identity login/logout, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including events, town contact info, messages, and user profile/admin status via an actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind CSS base layers with a Northern Maine wilderness-themed color palette for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying town facts, logo, and descriptive text about Jackman, Maine using a card-based layout.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page that fetches town address and phone number from the backend and provides a form to submit messages, with loading and success states.
frontend/src/pages/EventsPage.tsx: Events page that lists town events fetched from the backend, with admin-only controls to add or delete events via a form and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: The main landing page for the Jackman, Maine town website, featuring a hero section with navigation links, a hunting/fishing callout banner, quick links to Events, Recreation, and Services, and highlight cards for outdoor activities.
frontend/src/pages/RecreationPage.tsx: A recreation activities page listing outdoor pursuits available in Jackman, Maine (snowmobiling, fishing, hiking, paddling, camping, wildlife photography, and hunting) with descriptions and key highlights for each activity.
frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx: A town services page displaying emergency contacts (911), and details for municipal services including the Town Office, Public Works, Solid Waste, Library, and Motor Vehicle Registration with addresses, hours, and phone numbers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support for values like admin tokens.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color palettes (forest, slate, amber), typography fonts (Playfair Display, Source Sans 3), container settings, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 9) for a Jackman, Maine town website, listing existing features, architectural notes, and requirements covering homepage, about, services, events, recreation, contact, theming, and image assets.
